display.purpose: Large landing or mode titles, quiet weight, strong space.

mono.purpose: Fit metrics, export dimensions, code fragments, and column names.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Focused input or currently active generation area only.

shadows.name: inset-hairline
shadows.purpose: Precise internal edge for inputs and important panels.

shadows.name: none-by-default
shadows.purpose: Default for cards, panels, samples, and downloads.

motion.name: control-hover
motion.purpose: CTA, platform buttons, and compact controls.

components.name: Outline CTA
components.description: Moonshot-like transparent pill CTA for the landing page and mode entry.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.42); background: transparent; color: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.66); font: 450 16px/24px 'PingFang SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-cta span { opacity: 0; width: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: opacity 0.2s, width 0.2s; } .ds-cta:hover { border-color: oklch(96% 0 0); background: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.05); color: oklch(96% 0 0); } .ds-cta:hover span { opacity: 1; width: 14px; } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 40px oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.24); }

components.name: Graphite Panel
components.description: Default workbench surface: graphite, thin border, no external shadow.
components.html:
配置图像与拟合

选择 X/Y 轴、曲线和拟合方式，生成前会自动检查条件。
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.12); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(12.5% 0 0); color: oklch(96% 0 0); font-family: 'PingFang SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: none; } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.52; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.66); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.52; } .ds-panel:hover { border-color: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.42); }

components.name: Mode Choice
components.description: Two-entry mode selector, monochrome and low-noise.
components.css: .ds-mode { width: 100%; min-height: 160px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.12); border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(12.5% 0 0); color: oklch(96% 0 0); text-align: left; font-family: 'PingFang SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: none; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-mode span { display: block; margin-bottom: 24px; color: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.42); font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } .ds-mode strong { display: block; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.28; } .ds-mode small { display: block; margin-top: 12px; color: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.66); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.52; } .ds-mode:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.42); background: oklch(17% 0 0); } .ds-mode:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 40px oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.24); }

components.name: Large Input
components.description: Primary import or quick-start input surface, inspired by Moonshot's large translucent input but adapted away from chat.
components.css: .ds-input { display: grid; gap: 12px; padding: 18px 12px 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 24px; background: oklch(20% 0 0 / 0.30); color: oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.66); font: 450 14px/20px 'PingFang SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 -0.5px oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.10); transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input input { min-height: 44px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: oklch(96% 0 0); font-size: 18px; line-height: 36px; outline: 0; } .ds-input:focus-within { background: oklch(24% 0 0 / 0.36); border-color: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.12); box-shadow: 0 0 40px oklch(96% 0 0 / 0.24); }

components.name: Plot Paper
components.description: White chart output contained inside a monochrome graphite shell.
components.css: .ds-plot-shell { padding: 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.12); border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(12.5% 0 0); } .ds-plot-paper { min-height: 180px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(76% 0.004 260 / 0.36); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(97% 0.004 260); color: oklch(16% 0.005 260); font-family: 'PingFang SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-plot-paper strong { display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 24px; } .ds-plot-paper p { margin: 12px 0 0; color: oklch(48% 0.006 260); font: 500 13px/1.45 'SFMono-Regular', Menlo, monospace; }

narrative.overview: LabPlot Lite 的视觉系统应向 Moonshot 官网的克制黑场、清晰文字秩序和低色彩密度靠拢。它不复制 Moonshot 的品牌和内容，而是吸收黑白灰、强留白、轻 CTA 和少装饰的设计方法。
keyCharacteristics: 黑白灰优先：品牌层面不使用绿、琥珀、紫、蓝作为主视觉。
低装饰：少图标、少徽章、少彩色状态，避免 AI 模板感。
大留白：landing 和说明区使用 80px 级别分区间距，移动端收敛到 24px。
轻 CTA：圆角 pill、细边框、透明背景、hover 时轻微显现箭头或浅白底。
内容可信：图表、拟合指标和导出结果必须保持严谨可查，不被品牌视觉淹没。

rules.name: The Monochrome First Rule
rules.body: 默认任何新界面都先用黑、白、灰完成层级；只有语义状态和数据曲线允许使用彩色。

rules.name: The No Accent Branding Rule
rules.body: 不允许再用墨绿、琥珀、紫蓝渐变或荧光色作为 LabPlot Lite 的品牌主色。

rules.name: The Quiet Type Rule
rules.body: 字重保持 400 到 500 为主，只有关键工具标签可到 600。禁止到处使用 760 以上的强粗体。

rules.name: The Border Over Shadow Rule
rules.body: 优先用 1px 半透明白边、灰阶背景和间距建立层级，不给每个面板加阴影。

dos: Do 用黑、白、灰先完成所有视觉层级，再考虑语义色。
Do 使用 80px 级别分区留白，让首页像克制的产品展示，而不是表单集合。
Do 让 CTA 轻量化：透明底、细边框、pill、hover 轻反馈。
Do 保留图表白底输出，但把它限制在结果和导出区域。
donts: Don't 像复杂版 OriginLab，不要把大量按钮、菜单和参数一次性压给学生。
Don't 像泛 SaaS 官网，不要用大面积营销文案、装饰卡片网格或夸张转化话术替代真实工具。
Don't 像 AI 工具模板，不要使用彩色渐变、紫蓝 glow、玻璃拟态卡片、聊天框式首屏来暗示智能。
Don't 使用绿色或琥珀色作为品牌主色。它们只能作为图表数据色或语义状态色。
